prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025 年理科组最低位次约 6172→4346→4237→6161，2023–2024 年连续前移后，2025 年大幅后移约 1924 名，呈现明显大小年波动；2025 年基准约 6161 名；2021–2024 年理科组计划数 41→42→44→47 人，逐年小幅扩招；2025 年物理类计划 47 人，2026 年物理类计划 44 人，较 2025 年缩招 3 人（约 6.4%），缩招使竞争略有加剧，位次有前移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 56 名，近年排名在 54–61 名区间波动，层次稳定；近年声誉平稳，无重大负面舆情；抖音关注度一般，未进入总排名前 106 名；2021–2025 年均无投档断档记录，报考心理预期稳定；地质学、地质资源与地质工程为传统优势学科（第五轮学科评估数据未收录该校，参考第四轮评估：地质学 B+、地质资源与地质工程 B+、安全科学与工程 B+ 等），与招生专业中的地质类、资源勘查工程、安全工程等高度关联，对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类等工科专业社会热度持续较 高；宁夏 2026 年考生总数约 66000 人（不确定），按 2025 年比例估算物理类约 44550 人，与 2025 年 44491 人基本持平，考生规模变化不大；该校位于湖北武汉，在宁夏属跨省招生，2025 年物理类计划 47 人，占比较小；宁夏考生对中部地区 211 高校报考意愿稳定，无明显地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移后的回调压力、2026 年物理类缩招 6.4% 带来的竞争加剧，以及考生规模基本持平，预计 2026 年理科组最低位次较 2025 年小幅前移；预测最低位次约 5875 名，区间 5375–6375 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、软件工程等）
- 电子信息类（含电子信息工程、通信工程）
- 自动化类（含自动化、测控技术与仪器）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
- 地质学类
- 机械类（含机械设计制造及其自动化）
- 测绘类（测绘与信息类）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 地质类（资源能源）/ 资源勘查工程
- 安全科学与工程类（含安全工程）
- 材料类
- 应用化学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 5375–6375 名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如 5400 名以内）可重点冲刺计算机类、电子信息类等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（如 6300 名左右）建议以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次要求较低的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 6172→4346→4237→6161. After consecutive advances in 2023–2024, there was a significant retreat of about 1924 places in 2025, showing clear large-small year fluctuations; the baseline for 2025 is about 6161. From 2021 to 2024, the science group planned enrollment was 41→42→44→47, with a gradual small expansion. In 2025, the physics category planned enrollment was 47, and in 2026 it is 44, a reduction of 3 (about 6.4%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition and puts upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, about 56th in 2026, with recent rankings fluctuating between 54–61, indicating stable level. Recent reputation is stable, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin attention is average, not entering the top 106 overall. From 2021 to 2025, there were no records of enrollment gaps, and the psychological expectations for applications are stable. Geology, Geological Resources and Geological Engineering are traditional advantageous disciplines (the fifth round of discipline evaluation data is not included for this university; reference to the fourth round: Geology B+, Geological Resources and Geological Engineering B+, Safety Science and Engineering B+, etc.), which are highly related to the enrollment majors such as Geology, Resource Exploration Engineering, Safety Engineering, etc., providing stable attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity. The total number of candidates in Ningxia in 2026 is about 66,000 (uncertain), estimated based on the 2025 ratio to be about 44,550 for the physics category, roughly the same as the 44,491 in 2025, with little change in candidate scale. The university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and is a cross-provincial enrollment in Ningxia. In 2025, the physics category planned enrollment was 47, a small proportion. Ningxia candidates have stable willingness to apply to 211 universities in the central region, with no obvious changes in regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound pressure after the significant retreat in 2025 rankings, the intensified competition due to the 6.4% reduction in physics category enrollment in 2026, and the roughly stable candidate scale, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the science group in 2026 will slightly advance compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5875, with a range of 5375–6375.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, etc.)
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering)
- Automation (including Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Geology
- Mechanical (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation)
- Surveying and Mapping (Surveying and Information).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Geology (Resources and Energy) / Resource Exploration Engineering
- Safety Science and Engineering (including Safety Engineering)
- Materials
- Applied Chemistry.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 5375–6375, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 5400), you can focus on aiming for popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 6300), it is recommended to mainly consider Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group was approximately 1921→996→807→1238. After consecutive advances in 2023–2024, there was a slight backward shift of about 431 places in 2025; the baseline for 2025 is about 1238. The enrollment plan for the liberal arts group was 6→5→6 from 2022 to 2024, with 7 places for the history category in 2025 and 7 places in 2026, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, about 56th in 2026, with a stable range of 54–61 in recent years; reputation stable, no major negative public opinion; Douyin attention average; no admission gaps from 2021 to 2025; the university is mainly science and engineering, with relatively few liberal arts majors, such as Ideological and Political Education, Administrative Management, and Engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Economics, Business Administration, and other economics/management majors have divided social popularity; the total number of examinees in Ningxia in 2026 is about 66,000 (uncertain), with an estimated 21,450 in the history category based on the 2025 ratio, roughly the same as 21,406 in 2025; the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and recruits across provinces in Ningxia, with only 7 history category places in 2025, making the ranking fluctuation easily affected by the application behavior of a few candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the correction pressure after the slight backward shift in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and the basically unchanged candidate pool, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group in 2026 will slightly advance compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1218, with a range of 999–1437.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Ideological and Political Education
- Economics (including Economics, International Economics and Trade)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Business Administration (including Business Administration (Bilingual Teaching Class), Accounting)
- Administrative Management
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- English (new enrollment major in 2026)
- Public Administration (Grammar and Law) (enrollment major in 2022, not appearing in subsequent years, may have been adjusted)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 999–1437, the university has very few liberal arts majors (only 3–4), so it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors with Tier 1 as a reach; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 1000), you can aim for Ideological and Political Education or Economics; if your ranking is near the upper limit (e.g., around 1400), it is recommended to use Administrative Management or English as a safety.
